title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 528.390 - Lands may be sold in parcels, when
text:
528.390.  Lands may be sold in parcels, when. — If the premises consist of distinct buildings, farms, tracts or lots of land, they shall be sold separately; or when any tract of land or lot can be divided for the purpose of sale, with advantage to the parties interested, it may be so divided and sold in parcels.
(RSMo 1939 § 1747) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1583; 1919 § 2031; 1909 § 2595
